name: jupyterlab-ipyflow-ui-tests
description: ipyflow JupyterLab extension UI / end-to-end tests (Galata + Playwright)
overridesComment: Dedupe the transitive vega-lite copy of vega-expression up to 5.2.1, which patches the VEGA_DEBUG toString XSS (GHSA / dependabot #170). Stays within the vega 5.x line that @jupyterlab/galata requires.
